description:
As a visitor
  I want to learn about FashionHub
  So that I can understand the company's story and values

elements.name: Smoke — About page loads with correct title

steps.name: I am on the About page
the page title contains "About"

elements.name: Main heading is visible

steps.name: I am on the About page
I see the heading "About FashionHub"

elements.name: Key subsection headings are present on the About page

steps.name: I am on the About page
the about page contains the subsection "Our Story"

elements.name: Key subsection headings are present on the About page

steps.name: I am on the About page
the about page contains the subsection "Our Vision"

elements.name: Page contains descriptive content paragraphs

steps.name: I am on the About page
the about section has descriptive content

name: FashionHub About Page

description:
As a registered user
  I want to access my account page
  So that I can view my details and manage my session

elements.name: Authenticated user sees welcome message

steps.name: I am logged in as a valid user
I see a welcome message with my username

elements.name: Logout button is visible when logged in

steps.name: I am logged in as a valid user
the Logout button is visible

elements.name: Clicking Logout navigates away from account

steps.name: I am logged in as a valid user
I click the Logout button
I am no longer on the Account page

elements.name: Unauthenticated user does not see welcome message

steps.name: I am on the Account page without logging in
I do not see a welcome message

name: FashionHub Account Page

description:
As a registered user
  I want to log in to FashionHub
  So that I can access my account

elements.name: Smoke — Login page loads with a visible form

steps.name: I am on the Login page
the login form is visible

elements.name: Valid login redirects to account page

steps.name: I am on the Login page
I enter valid credentials
I am redirected to the Account page
I see a welcome message with my username

elements.name: Invalid credentials keep the user on the login page

steps.name: I am on the Login page
I enter username "demouser" and password "wrongpassword"
I remain on the Login page

elements.name: Invalid credentials keep the user on the login page

steps.name: I am on the Login page
I enter username "nonexistentuser" and password "fashion123"
I remain on the Login page

elements.name: Invalid credentials keep the user on the login page

steps.name: I am on the Login page
I enter username "demouser" and password "123"
I remain on the Login page

elements.name: Invalid credentials keep the user on the login page

steps.name: I am on the Login page
I enter username "admin" and password "admin"
I remain on the Login page

elements.name: Submitting empty credentials stays on login page

steps.name: I am on the Login page
I click the Login button without entering credentials
I remain on the Login page

name: FashionHub Login

description:
As a shopper
  I want to manage my shopping cart
  So that I can review and purchase my items

elements.name: Empty cart is handled gracefully

steps.name: I am on the Cart page
the cart page loads without errors

elements.name: Adding a product shows it in the cart

steps.name: I am on the Products page
I add the first product to the cart
I navigate to the Cart page
the cart contains at least one item

elements.name: Cart shows correct total after adding a product

steps.name: I am on the Products page
I add the first product to the cart
I navigate to the Cart page
the cart total is greater than zero

elements.name: Removing an item decreases the cart count

steps.name: I am on the Products page
I add the first product to the cart
I navigate to the Cart page
I remove the first cart item
the cart item count decreases

elements.name: Clicking Checkout shows a confirmation dialog

steps.name: I am on the Products page
I add the first product to the cart
I navigate to the Cart page
I click the Checkout button
a confirmation dialog appears
I remain on the Cart page

name: FashionHub Shopping Cart

description:
As a visitor
  I want to see the FashionHub home page
  So that I can explore the shop

elements.name: Smoke — Home page loads with correct title

steps.name: I am on the Home page
the page title contains "FashionHub"

elements.name: Hero section is visible with a welcome heading

steps.name: I am on the Home page
the hero section is visible
it contains a welcome heading

elements.name: Navigation bar contains all expected links

steps.name: I am on the Home page
the navigation bar contains a link to "Clothing"
the navigation bar contains a link to "About"

elements.name: Feature highlights section displays three items

steps.name: I am on the Home page
the feature section shows at least 3 highlight items

elements.name: Shop Now button navigates to the Products page

steps.name: I am on the Home page
I click the "Shop Now" button
the Products page is displayed

name: FashionHub Home Page

description:
As a shopper
  I want to browse the product catalogue
  So that I can find items to buy

elements.name: Smoke — Products page loads with correct title

steps.name: I am on the Products page
the page title contains "Products"

elements.name: At least one product card is displayed

steps.name: I am on the Products page
at least one product card is visible

elements.name: Product cards show a name and a price

steps.name: I am on the Products page
each visible product card has a name
each visible product card has a price

elements.name: Each product price is formatted as currency

steps.name: I am on the Products page
the price of product "Peacock Coat" matches the currency format

elements.name: Each product price is formatted as currency

steps.name: I am on the Products page
the price of product "Casual Coat" matches the currency format

elements.name: Each product price is formatted as currency

steps.name: I am on the Products page
the price of product "Puffer Jacket" matches the currency format

elements.name: Adding a product updates the cart

steps.name: I am on the Products page
I add the first product to the cart
the cart reflects the added item

name: FashionHub Products Page
